title: My Soul for Your Salvation Yearns

verses.text: My soul for your salvation yearns and faints, but I have set my hope upon your word. My eyes with longing seek your promised help; I say, “When will you comfort me, O Lord?”
I’m shriveled like a wineskin in the smoke, yet I do not forget all your decrees. O how much longer must your servant wait? O when, Lord, will you judge my enemies?
The proud have hidden pitfalls in my way; their minds are fixed against your holy laws. Your precepts all remain forever sure; Lord, help me! for they hound me without cause.
They almost made an end of me on earth, but I have not forsaken your decree. Preserve my life according to your love; that all the words your mouth speaks I may keep.
